archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Industrial Command Center Variant)

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align dense data. Strict column structure.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders: Flat background (#171717), 1px solid border (#262626), 0px radius. Hover: slight border color lighten, no shadow.
surfaces.header_nav: Solid background (#0A0A0A) with hard bottom border (#262626). No glassmorphism.
surfaces.buttons: Brutalist block. Sharp corners. Primary filled with #FF5500, black text. High contrast.

components.charts: Recharts with grid lines visible. Use #FF5500 and #00F0FF for lines/bars.
components.tables: High-density. Sticky header, right-aligned numbers, zebra striping for rows (#0A0A0A / #111111).
components.inputs: Flat, sharp borders, focus ring in #FF5500.
components.customization: Heavily customize Shadcn components to remove 'Vercel-look'. Make corners sharp (rounded-none).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp color shifts. No bouncy animations.

login_hero_bg.description: Abstract dark industrial UI background texture for the auth/login screen.

automation_panel_bg.description: Background image for the Automation Integration Panel.

wms_logistics_bg.description: Visual header or background for Warehouse Management module.

factory_generic.description: Large machine in factory, can be used for multi-plant view thumbnails.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Control Room' grid (Mode B) for dashboard layouts, ensuring zero wasted space and tight alignment.
Apply 'Grid Borders' surface strategy: Avoid standard rounded cards; use sharp, 0px border radius with 1px solid borders for a technical, tactical feel.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use Recharts for data visualizations (Production throughput, demand forecasting) and style them with the provided accent colors (#FF5500, #00F0FF).
Integrate the Emergent Google Auth visually onto a login screen utilizing the 'login_hero_bg' image.
Make sure 'IBM Plex Sans' is applied for all tables and body data, and 'Barlow Condensed' for major KPI numbers and headers.
The codebase uses .js files, not .tsx. Implement all frontend components accordingly.
